name: Readymode Predictive Dialer API
what_it_does: Predictive dialer and outbound call center platform with API — using predictive algorithms to dial multiple numbers simultaneously per agent, connecting reps instantly when a prospect answers, with built-in CRM, call recording, reporting, and integrations for outbound sales and contact center operations.
use_cases: Importing contact lists into Readymode for predictive dialer campaigns via API
Querying call outcomes, dispositions, and rep performance metrics for reporting
Integrating Readymode call data with external CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot) via webhook
Managing Readymode campaigns and lists programmatically for dynamic outbound programs
Pulling agent performance data (calls/hour, connect rate) for coaching dashboards
not_for: Inbound contact center routing (use Five9 or Genesys for inbound ACD)
Small SDR teams needing AI-powered parallel dialing (use Orum or Nooks for AI dialers)
Enterprise sales engagement with sequencing (use Outreach or Salesloft for full SEP)
best_when: A high-volume outbound call center (insurance, mortgage, collections, political) needs a predictive dialer to maximize agent talk time with built-in CRM capabilities.
avoid_when: You're a B2B SaaS SDR team, need multi-channel outreach, or have <10 agents (predictive dialing requires volume to work effectively).

auth.notes: API key authentication. Bearer token in headers. Account-scoped access. Webhook for call events and dispositions. Salesforce integration via API. TCPA compliance tools built in. No OAuth2. Call recording storage via included platform storage or external storage integration.

pricing.notes: Vancouver, BC company. Founded 2009 as XenCALL, rebranded to Readymode 2021. Canadian telecom background. Predictive dialer focused on high-volume outbound verticals — insurance, mortgage, real estate, collections. Built-in CRM reduces need for separate CRM for simple outbound programs. TCPA and CRTC compliance tools. Known for reliability and uptime in high-volume environments.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for lists, campaigns, calls, and reporting. API key auth. Moderate public documentation. Built-in CRM reduces external integration complexity. Webhook for call disposition events. TCPA and CRTC compliance tools require proper configuration before use. Predictive algorithm requires 10+ agents to work effectively.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Report reads idempotent. Contact reads idempotent. Contact creation not idempotent — check phone number before adding.
known_agent_gotchas: TCPA compliance mandatory for US outbound — implement DNC scrubbing before every campaign
CRTC compliance required for Canadian outbound calling
Predictive dialing requires 10+ agents for algorithm to work; below that, use power dialer
Call abandonment rate regulations: TCPA requires <3% abandon rate for predictive dialing
Built-in CRM may conflict with external CRM — plan data flow before implementation

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 compliant. US and Canadian data residency. API key auth. TCPA and CRTC compliance required — implement DNC registry scrubbing. Call recording data is legally sensitive — follow state/provincial recording consent laws (two-party consent in some states). Consumer contact data is PII — handle per CCPA and PIPEDA.
